target.name: Lysozyme
target.prediction_scope: Preview-first reference. Folded object would be one 129-residue lysozyme chain; its 4 disulfide bonds are inferred geometry, not modeled covalent bonds.
target.omitted_context: Reference preview is 1LYZ chain A protein atoms only. Bundled offline Fold needs a generated demo cache; until then, Fold requires the local backend.
